programme.title: AHORA Planeta Tierra
programme.desc: Un programa centrado en noticias ambientales y climáticas. Con reportajes investigativos desde ciudades de EE. UU. y América Latina, y conversaciones con personas que dirigen soluciones creativas para mitigar el impacto del cambio climático.

programme.title: El Barón
programme.desc: Ledher señala a Judy y Escobar la captura con vida para que confiese. Nacho se entera de la jugada de Lehder y alerta al Paisa. Isabel ruega por la vida de su hijo.

programme.title: El Barón
programme.desc: La Madrina tiene como rehén a Isabel y es su mejor arma para atrapar a Nacho y desquitarse con él. Kyle se lleva al niño. Thompson promete al carcelero 50 000 dólares a cambio de su ayuda.

programme.title: El señor de los cielos
programme.desc: Aurelio se encuentra cara a cara con Danilo Ferro y comienza a usar su identidad. Leonor registra el negocio de Matilde y hace que la arresten por todo el material importante que encuentra.

programme.title: El señor de los cielos
programme.desc: Bigotes le dispara a Nevárez frente a su hija. Agonizando, Pedro ruega a Victoria que deje México, porque ya el país es muy peligroso. Matilde conoce a Elsa, y ambas son manipuladas por el Chema.

programme.title: El señor de los cielos
programme.desc: Elsa cree tener el camino libre para ser gobernadora, pero Victoria anuncia su candidatura. Bigotes está herido, escapa de los hombres de Chema e intenta darle toda la información a Leonor.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Alejandro empieza a ganar terreno con David. Antonia convence a su hijo mayor de quedarse en San Pedro. Ella se muestra arrepentida y aprovecha las fiestas patronales para anunciar la boda.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Antonia seduce a David con regalos caros, despertando envidias en otros niños. David huye y se pone en peligro. Alejandro lo rescata. Gabriela no se contiene y descarga su furia ante todos.

programme.title: Al otro lado del muro: Lorena confiesa su error
programme.desc: Lorena debe enfrentar cargos por traición a Interpol y admite que por celos a Sofía, falló y puso a todos en peligro. Jennifer sueña con Steve en el congelador. Eliza se enfada con Tomás.

programme.title: Caso cerrado
programme.desc: René debe operarse de cáncer, pero su esposa le hace esperar a que los astros se alineen, y él decide pedir ayuda. Obligaron a Rubén a casarse, pero luego descubrió que lo engañaron para obtener los papeles.

programme.title: Caso cerrado
programme.desc: Abril acusa a Geraldine de provocarle el aborto y matar a su hijo ahora, le exige 100 mil dólares. Para sanar el cáncer, Rita contrató a Rosita para hacerle sexo oral y ella la demanda por acoso.

programme.title: Caso cerrado
programme.desc: Lucía confundió a Patricio con un delincuente y lo metió preso, ahora él exige compensación. Katerine aumentó el tamaño de su trasero, pero le inyectaron biopolímeros que le causan problemas.

programme.title: Caso cerrado
programme.desc: Un hombre fue despedido de un bar gay cuando intentó ligar con una chica. Una pareja tenía todo listo para la fecundación in vitro, pero él murió y su amante continuó el proceso ahora, la esposa reclama sus derechos.

programme.title: Al extremo
programme.desc: Un programa periodístico que compila varios segmentos de noticias, las cuales tienen una cosa en común, estas son impactantes y asombrosas, algunas de estas noticias que se presentan son controversiales y algunas algo amarillistas. Una serie entretenida que dejará con la boca abierta a más de uno de sus espectadores, las noticias que se incluyen son sobre temas criminales, de salud, religiosos en el que se incluyen milagros y notas curiosas que son de interés público, entre otras, también se informa al público sobre los famosos que están haciendo noticia e información interesante sobre el mundo del entretenimiento.

programme.desc: Josh descubre un GTO Judge y un Buick GNX del '87. En Auctions America, Keith pasea en un Land Cruiser con motor diésel.

programme.title: Buster Williams
programme.sub-title: Ode to Miles: Bitches Brew Beyond
programme.desc: For the 40th anniversary of jazz legend Miles Davis' legendary album Bitches Brew, trumpeter Wallace Roney leads a band that revives the master's music. This project is the brainchild of Miles' family (including his son Erin), which is represented by his nephew, drummer Vince Wilburn. This concert at the ancient theater in Vienne, France, is a grand tribute to Miles.

programme.title: Bill Evans
programme.desc: An extraordinary collection of clips in all jazz genres from the most beautiful concerts and the most special festivals, performed by the finest jazz musicians.

programme.title: Junior Mance, Geoff Keezer, Bill Charlap & Alex Wilson
programme.desc: When renowned jazz pianists of the old and new school meet at a "Solo Piano Summit," audiences are treated to many an interesting musical surprise. The "Solo Piano Summit" brings together a handful of top pianists with different musical backgrounds: Jacky Terrasson, Junior Mance, Geoff Keezer, Bill Charlap and Alex Wilson. Besides solo performances the all-stars used the occasion for spontaneous interplay, improvisation and a fantastic finale - in short for the pleasure of virtuoso jazz piano playing.

programme.title: Charles Lloyd
programme.desc: An extraordinary collection of clips in all jazz genres from the most beautiful concerts and the most special festivals, performed by the finest jazz musicians.

programme.title: Omar Sosa, Childo Tomas, Ernesto Simpson & Leandro Saint-Hill
programme.desc: While always keeping one foot firmly anchored in the traditions of his home country, Cuba, Omar Sosa tirelessly explores music from the Caribbean to India, and West Africa to the Arab world. Since he left Cuba in 1993, the pianist has been blending his Afro-Cuban roots with jazz, hip hop, electro and world music. For his 2018 performance at Théâtre de Villefranche-sur-Saône, he brings to stage his Quarteto Afrocubano members Childo Tomas (electric bass & vocals), Ernesto Simpson (drums), and Leandro Saint-Hill (saxophones, flute, percussion & vocals). Together, they create a riveting instrumental dialogue. Celebrating rhythm in all its forms, this Omar Sosa concert is an intense and mystical experience.

programme.title: Billie Holiday
programme.desc: “God Bless The Child”, “Foolin' Myself”, and “I Loves You, Porgy”: timeless songs that were made classics by the inimitable Billie Holiday. ‘Lady Day', as her loyal friend and musical partner Lester Young nicknamed her, was a highly original jazz and pop singer. In a career that spanned most of the 1930s, 1940s and 1950s, she displayed an uncanny ability to convey emotion through her voice. Her vocals, which were strongly inspired by instrumental jazz, are admired for their deeply personal and intimate sound. This compilation features recordings from the 1950s of Billie Holiday singing a string of her greatest successes. Enjoy this unique footage of one of jazz's all-time greats!

programme.title: Glass Marcano, Orchestre Symphonique Région Centre-Val de Loire/Tours & Stéphanie-Marie Degand
programme.sub-title: Beethoven Violin Concerto & Bizet Symphony in C
programme.desc: Young Venezuelan conductor Glass Marcano is a rising star. Having played in various local youth and symphony orchestras as a violinist, her first experience conducting an ensemble followed in 2012. In September 2020, she won the Orchestra Prize at La Maestra Competition – the first orchestra direction contest for women – held in Paris. In this concert, recorded at Opéra de Tours in February 2021, Marcano leads the Orchestre Symphonique Région Centre-Val de Loire/Tours in performances of two Romantic masterpieces. The program opens with Ludwig van Beethoven's Violin Concerto in D major, Op. 61, featuring Stéphanie-Marie Degand as the soloist. This piece is one of the most important works in its genre. The program concludes with Georges Bizet's 1855 Symphony in C major, written when the composer was only 17 years old.

programme.title: Nikolay Lugansky
programme.desc: Cinematic classical clips and energizing concert pieces featuring up-and-coming artists.

programme.title: David Grimal & Les Dissonances
programme.desc: Les Dissonances is a collective of artists founded by violinist David Grimal in 2004. The conductorless ensemble consists of musicians from the most prestigious European orchestras, international soloists, and young talents. In this performance, Les Dissonances play Wolfgang Amadeus Mozart's Violin Concerto No. 4 in D major, K. 218. Leading violinist Grimal features as the soloist. With the exception of the first violin concerto, Mozart composed his other four violin concertos in 1775 at a time when he was concertmaster at the Salzburg court. Among his five concertos, Violin Concerto No. 4 is one of the best-known. This performance was recorded at Cité de la Musique, France, in 2014.

programme.title: Eliane Reyes
programme.desc: Cinematic classical clips and energizing concert pieces featuring up-and-coming artists.

programme.title: Matthias Goerne, Vilde Frang, Nicolas Altstaedt & Stathis Karapanos
programme.sub-title: J. S. Bach - Arias, solos, and duets
programme.desc: Baritone Matthias Goerne teams up with violinist Vilde Frang, cellist Nicolas Altstaedt, flutist Stathis Karapanos, and harpsichordist Michaela Hasselt in this program dedicated to the music of J. S. Bach. They perform baritone arias from Bach's most beautiful cantatas, as well as solo pieces and duets. On the program are Sonata No. 3 in C major for violin solo, BWV 1005 arias ‘Hier, in meines Vaters Stätte', BWV 32 and ‘Die Welt mit allen Königreichen', BWV 59 Suite No. 5 in C minor for cello solo, BWV 1011 ‘Wenn Trost und Hülf ermangeln muß', BWV 117 ‘Ja, ja, ich halte Jesum fest', BWV 157 Invention No. 7 in E minor, BWV 778 Invention in A major, BWV 783 and ‘Welt ade, ich bin dein müde', BWV 158. This performance was recorded at St. Mary's Church in Wittenberg, Germany.

programme.title: Daniel Barenboim
programme.desc: Cinematic classical clips and energizing concert pieces featuring up-and-coming artists.

programme.title: Václav Luks & Collegium 1704
programme.desc: J. S. Bach's six Brandenburg Concerto's belong to his best-known works. The composer wrote these concertos between 1711 and 1720 and dedicated them in 1721 to Christian Ludwig, Margrave of Brandenburg. In celebration of the pieces' 300th anniversary, Czech harpsichordist and conductor Václav Luks and the renowned Baroque ensemble Collegium 1704 recorded all six Brandenburg Concertos on historical instruments in 2021. The concertos are based on the Italian concerto grosso form, in which a group of solo instruments is set against a large ensemble. Bach's Brandenburg Concertos feature remarkable combinations of solo instruments and virtuoso solos. This performance was recorded at the Hall of Mirrors in the Köthen Castle, Germany.

programme.title: Herbert Blomstedt & Gewandhausorchester Leipzig
programme.sub-title: Symphonies in D by Mozart and Voríšek
programme.desc: Conductor Herbert Blomstedt and the Gewandhausorchester take us on a musical journey to the Czech Republic in this 2020 concert from Leipzig's Gewandhaus. The program opens with Bohemian composer Jan Václav Hugo Voríšek's Symphony in D major, Op. 23 (1821). Although the composition – Voríšek's only symphony – was never performed during the composer's lifetime, it has become one of his most-performed works today. Also on the program is Wolfgang Amadeus Mozart's Symphony No. 38 in D major, K. 504. This work, which premiered while Mozart was visiting Prague in 1787, is often referred to as the ‘Prague Symphony'.

programme.title: Morning Sun on Yosemite Falls
programme.desc: Watch as the morning sunlight slowly casts its golden light onto the majestic Upper Yosemite Falls, with this 4K ultra high definition real-time nature video featuring stereo sounds captured along the falls trail. It's perfect for meditating or for transforming your TV into a window to one of North America's most grandiose and inspiring locations.

programme.title: Waimamaku Beach: New Zealand
programme.desc: This exquisite destination is a roughly 1-hour journey from the nearest community. Experience the remote, cliff-lined, cavernous coastline that's described as the most "spectacular" in the region.

programme.title: Wairere Falls: New Zealand
programme.desc: Discover the breathtaking beauty of a majestic 153-metre waterfall plunging spectacularly over a cliff and onto the boulders below.

programme.title: Wells Gray Falls
programme.desc: Relax to a peaceful soundtrack as you take in a mystical waterfall tumbling over the edge of a cliff.

programme.title: Sunny Getaways
programme.desc: Spend a restful moment in Maui, a tropical paradise of gleaming white sand beaches and turquoise waters.

programme.title: Underwater Wonders
programme.desc: Sit back, relax, and embark on a colorful sea undersea voyage filled with the awe-inspiring wildlife wonders of the coral reefs from around the world. Paired with brand new music by Relax Moods, this 4K version is 1 hour long, making it perfect to leave on as a soothing backdrop during your day or while falling asleep.

programme.title: Tutoko River: New Zealand
programme.desc: Follow the rushing waters through rocky rapids, and enjoy scenic views of lush mountains.

programme.title: Fresh Awakening
programme.desc: Earth And Stars E3: Earth Day — A beautiful, artistic tribute to our planet, from splendid skyscapes and depictions of our solar system, to sprawling forests, snow-capped mountains, and marine animals. The range of styles explore our connection to the vast and vivid universe.

programme.title: Fresh Awakening
programme.desc: Living Creatures E2: Derby Dreams — Inspired by the Kentucky Derby, one of the most iconic horse races in the world, this collection is a celebration of the beauty, strength, and speed of these magnificent animals.

programme.title: Fresh Awakening
programme.desc: Fresh Awakening: Living Creatures E4, Wings of Color — A captivating collection celebrating the vibrant beauty and symbolism of butterflies. Bursting with color, each piece captures their delicate wings, graceful flight, and transformative spirit—evoking renewal, freedom, and nature's fleeting wonders.

programme.title: Fresh Awakening
programme.sub-title: Earth And Stars III — A Sustainable Future by Climate Art Collection
programme.desc: Earth And Stars E3: A Sustainable Future presented by Climate Art Collection — This collection addresses climate change awareness through art, in collaboration with the Climate Art Collection, the largest collection of climate change-related artworks in the world. It highlights the Climate Art Collection's mission to support climate initiatives through art and make scientific concepts more accessible.

programme.title: Morning Inspiration
programme.desc: Painters' Showcase S1E1 — Extraordinary paintings hand-selected by the Loupe team.

programme.title: Morning Inspiration
programme.desc: Striking Abstracts S1E1 — Dive into a mesmerizing symphony of color and form with this bold abstract art collection. Immerse yourself in a journey where shapes dance, colors converse, and the music paints a cinematic soundscape occupying the space between mirage and reality.

programme.title: Morning Inspiration
programme.desc: Striking Abstracts S1E2: Cinematice Dimensions — Immerse yourself in a visual journey where shapes dance and colors converse, inviting you to redefine the way you perceive art. Dare to experience the extraordinary with soft and deep house beats.

programme.title: Shades Of Color: Shades Of Teal
programme.desc: Shades Of Color S1E9: Shades of Teal — Step into a world of calm serenity where each piece expertly utilizes the soothing shade of teal to evoke a sense of tranquility & relaxation. From serene oceanscapes to abstract compositions, be transported & unwind in a realm of peace and harmony.
